name: Weered Connect
description:
Bridges Minecraft to Weered (weered.ca), a lobby-first community platform. Auto-registers the server you join as a Weered lobby, shows a HUD list of other Weered users on the same server, and lets you find recurring groups for your Realm or private server.

Data sent to api.weered.ca: your Minecraft username and UUID, the address of the server you join, and the world name. No chat, location, inventory, or other in-game data is transmitted. You can unlink at any time from your Weered settings page.
